note: Curated West Loop / 34th Ward real estate agents. The Agent Spotlight rotates through this list by day. Add agents here as they are confirmed.

agents.name: Stephanie Fedor
agents.blurb: A licensed Chicago broker since 2018 and part of Compass's LAKE Group, a Top Producing team with more than $650 million in sales. Stephanie has lived downtown for nearly two decades and knows the West Loop intimately, having helped open neighborhood restaurants like Girl & the Goat and Aba before real estate. She writes a dedicated West Loop real estate blog and works with both buyers and sellers.

agents.name: Ilsa Conover
agents.blurb: A Chicago real estate broker with more than 16 years of experience, Ilsa focuses on the West Loop along with Lincoln Park, River North, and the Gold Coast. She works with first-time and repeat buyers and sellers on everything from condo conversions to new-construction and luxury properties, and is known for hands-on, client-first communication.

agents.name: Stephanie Turner
agents.brokerage: Jameson Sotheby's International Realty, CS Collective
agents.blurb: A West Loop resident since 1999 who specializes in luxury condos and single-family homes, typically in the $600,000 to $3 million range. Real estate runs in her family: her father has run a commercial and residential appraisal firm for over 50 years and her mother has been a Realtor for nearly 30. She partners with Christine Egly Rashkow as the CS Collective.

brokerages.name: The West Loop Team (Keller Williams)
brokerages.note: A West Loop and Fulton Market focused team with 20-plus years of combined experience.

brokerages.name: Compass Chicago
brokerages.note: Large national brokerage with deep West Loop and Fulton Market inventory.

brokerages.name: @properties Christie's International
brokerages.note: Chicago's largest independent brokerage, strong across the ward.

brokerages.name: Jameson Sotheby's International Realty
brokerages.note: Luxury-focused brokerage covering the West Loop and downtown.

brokerages.name: Baird & Warner
brokerages.note: One of the oldest family-owned brokerages in the country, active downtown.
